## Meeting Purpose

[Follow-up discussion between Float Financial and GrowthX to explore potential content marketing partnership](https://fathom.video/share/mAHFFuTHUFQEMG4bDMQwxsd3ch4mxq5h?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers AI-powered content creation with expert human oversight, tailored for each client's unique needs and voice](https://fathom.video/share/mAHFFuTHUFQEMG4bDMQwxsd3ch4mxq5h?tab=summary&timestamp=608.0)
  - [Float seeks to improve organic search performance, focusing on Canadian finance topics and audience](https://fathom.video/share/mAHFFuTHUFQEMG4bDMQwxsd3ch4mxq5h?tab=summary&timestamp=474.0)
  - [GrowthX proposes an 8-week strategy sprint to develop a tailored roadmap and test mutual fit before longer-term engagement](https://fathom.video/share/mAHFFuTHUFQEMG4bDMQwxsd3ch4mxq5h?tab=summary&timestamp=1228.0)
  - [Timing considerations: GrowthX has 4-6 week lead time for new client onboarding due to high demand](https://fathom.video/share/mAHFFuTHUFQEMG4bDMQwxsd3ch4mxq5h?tab=summary&timestamp=1430.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Team and Approach

  - [Led by experienced editors and SEO experts (e.g. former TechCrunch editor-in-chief, Apple blog lead)](https://fathom.video/share/mAHFFuTHUFQEMG4bDMQwxsd3ch4mxq5h?tab=summary&timestamp=1036.0)
  - [Uses modular AI workflows with human expert oversight at key stages](https://fathom.video/share/mAHFFuTHUFQEMG4bDMQwxsd3ch4mxq5h?tab=summary&timestamp=1098.0)
  - [Calibration phase to set strategy, voice, and content standards](https://fathom.video/share/mAHFFuTHUFQEMG4bDMQwxsd3ch4mxq5h?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Flexible process adapts to client needs (e.g. fact-checking for regulated industries)](https://fathom.video/share/mAHFFuTHUFQEMG4bDMQwxsd3ch4mxq5h?tab=summary&timestamp=1366.0)

### Float's Current Content Situation

  - [Small team (SEO strategist, blog manager, content agency for premium content)](https://fathom.video/share/mAHFFuTHUFQEMG4bDMQwxsd3ch4mxq5h?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)
  - [Averaging 5 posts/week, some AI experimentation (AirOps, Athena HQ)](https://fathom.video/share/mAHFFuTHUFQEMG4bDMQwxsd3ch4mxq5h?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)
  - [Q1 focused on foundational content, Q2 on mid-funnel educational content](https://fathom.video/share/mAHFFuTHUFQEMG4bDMQwxsd3ch4mxq5h?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)
  - [Seeing traction with corporate card content, mileage calculator](https://fathom.video/share/mAHFFuTHUFQEMG4bDMQwxsd3ch4mxq5h?tab=summary&timestamp=1996.0)

### Canadian Market Considerations

  - [Need for Canada-specific focus in topics and tone](https://fathom.video/share/mAHFFuTHUFQEMG4bDMQwxsd3ch4mxq5h?tab=summary&timestamp=832.0)
  - [Lower search volumes but potentially less keyword difficulty](https://fathom.video/share/mAHFFuTHUFQEMG4bDMQwxsd3ch4mxq5h?tab=summary&timestamp=872.0)
  - [Challenge: ensuring realistic traffic projections based on Canadian data](https://fathom.video/share/mAHFFuTHUFQEMG4bDMQwxsd3ch4mxq5h?tab=summary&timestamp=865.0)

### Content Strategy Discussion

  - [GrowthX proposes balance of SEO-driven and brand/thought leadership content](https://fathom.video/share/mAHFFuTHUFQEMG4bDMQwxsd3ch4mxq5h?tab=summary&timestamp=889.0)
  - [Emphasis on addressing user pain points and questions, not just keywords](https://fathom.video/share/mAHFFuTHUFQEMG4bDMQwxsd3ch4mxq5h?tab=summary&timestamp=1713.0)
  - [Adapting to evolving search landscape (e.g. AI answer engines impacting click-through rates)](https://fathom.video/share/mAHFFuTHUFQEMG4bDMQwxsd3ch4mxq5h?tab=summary&timestamp=2418.0)

### GrowthX Case Study: Ramp

  - [Ongoing client relationship since August 2022](https://fathom.video/share/mAHFFuTHUFQEMG4bDMQwxsd3ch4mxq5h?tab=summary&timestamp=1824.0)
  - [Created scalable content like expense categories and per diem calculator](https://fathom.video/share/mAHFFuTHUFQEMG4bDMQwxsd3ch4mxq5h?tab=summary&timestamp=2545.0)
  - [Seeing success in both traditional search and AI answer engines](https://fathom.video/share/mAHFFuTHUFQEMG4bDMQwxsd3ch4mxq5h?tab=summary&timestamp=2580.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send meeting recording and detailed document](https://fathom.video/share/mAHFFuTHUFQEMG4bDMQwxsd3ch4mxq5h?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)
  - [Dana to review materials with Ruslan (Float team member)](https://fathom.video/share/mAHFFuTHUFQEMG4bDMQwxsd3ch4mxq5h?tab=summary&timestamp=2771.0)
  - [Float to consider GrowthX's 8-week strategy sprint proposal](https://fathom.video/share/mAHFFuTHUFQEMG4bDMQwxsd3ch4mxq5h?tab=summary&timestamp=2488.0)
  - [Follow up with any additional questions via provided Slack channel](https://fathom.video/share/mAHFFuTHUFQEMG4bDMQwxsd3ch4mxq5h?tab=summary&timestamp=2756.0)
